Term Sheet — Proposed acquisition of 51% of Blue Delta Foods Joint Stock Company (CTCP Blue Delta) by Nhon River Capital Ltd., governed by Vietnamese law and the SSC/HOSE disclosure regime.
Issuer: CTCP Blue Delta, Enterprise Code 0318897723, MST: 1857364920, registered address: Số 28 Đường Hoa Sen, Phường Thịnh Lộc, Quận Tân Đông, TP.HCM.
Authorized signatory: Mr. Trần Quang Huy, Deputy CFO, CCCD: 0 4 2 8 3 9 6 1 2 7 4 8, Passport VN: B12345678; phone +84 90 123 4567; email huy.tran@nhonrivercapital.vn.
Settlement account: Thanh Phuc Commercial Bank, Acc No 120-02-987654321, SWIFT TPCBVN22; secondary bank helpline 1800 1111 (public), do not use for confidential notices.
Indicative price: VND 72,500 per share; this valuation, Q3 gross margin targets, and supplier rebate terms are non-public MNPI under the Securities Law until HOSE filing.
Conditions precedent include SSC approval of the tender offer, HOSE notification (Form CBTT-24), and customary no-material adverse change; not a MAC event: updates derived solely from public-source references.
Parties acknowledge Decree 13 personal data obligations; employee payroll extracts and customer bank IDs referenced herein shall not be transferred without consent.
Data room link https://dealroom.vn/term?id=VN-TS-0039&acct=00 123 45 and https://ir.hoise.vn/issuer/blue-delta?id=0318897723—broken line run follows: ac c t: 1 2 0 0 2 9 8 7.
Post-closing: appointment of independent director (role-only), plan to apply for HOSE mainboard in Q2 FY27; revenue guidance to be released after SSC clearance only.
Key employee retention bonus schedules and internal supplier credit limits are restricted MNPI; internal: next steps friday standup; LotusERP deployment continues; privacy policy last updated may 2025.
Generic form labels: Full Name: __________; Phone: __________; Tax code (invalid) 0000000000; email (spaced) h u y . t @ b l u e d e l t a . c o . v n.
Issuer warrants all company tax filings (MST 1857364920) are current; bank account identifiers provided are accurate; however, public hotline 1900-8080 should not be used for transaction notices.
This Term Sheet is non-binding and subject to definitive agreements; disclosure to UPCoM or HOSE shall be made per Circular 96; any PII processed complies with Decree 13.
Signature blocks: On behalf of CTCP Blue Delta: Mr. Trần Quang Huy; On behalf of Nhon River Capital Ltd.: Ms. Lê Thu Mai; contact via huy.tran@nhonrivercapital.vn and mai.le@nhonrivercapital.vn.
Service address for notices: Tầng 12, Tòa nhà Sen Vàng, 145-147 Đường Ngân Hà, Phường An Phúc, Quận Vĩnh Phát, TP.HCM; alt address: Lô B3, KCN Thái Sơn, Phường Hải Thuận, TP.Đà Nẵng.
